executives.name: Jonathan Evans
executives.background: Mr. Evans has more than 20 years of operations and general management experience across the chemical and manufacturing industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Lithium Americas Corp. (now Lithium Americas (Argentina) Corp.) and has held executive roles at FMC Corporation and Arysta LifeScience.

executives.name: Pablo Mercado
executives.background: Mr. Mercado has over 20 years of experience in finance and corporate development in the energy industry. He previously served as CFO of EnLink Midstream, LLC and held senior roles at ConocoPhillips.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Aubrey Eveleigh
executives.background: Mr. Eveleigh has over 30 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He was a co-founder of the predecessor Lithium Americas Corp. and has served in various executive capacities.

board_of_directors.name: George Ireland
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ireland has over 40 years of experience in the resource sector in positions ranging from field geologist to banking and venture capital. He is the founder and Chief Investment Officer of Geologic Resource Partners LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Jonathan Evans
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Lithium Americas Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Fabiana Chubbs
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Chubbs was the CFO of Eldorado Gold Corporation from 2011 to 2018. She is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jinhee Magie
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Magie is the CFO and Senior Vice President of Lundin Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Zak Mahone
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mahone is a Managing Director at Geologic Resource Partners LLC.

sources.source_description: Management Information Circular (Proxy Statement) filed on Form DEF 14A
